merlin_thesis: NAS100 at 29,201 after massive Jun 4 crash (-1,552pts / -5.1%). Price deep in discount (27.7% of D1 range 28,596-30,776) following SSL sweep near May 18 low. Macro trend remains bullish (HH/HL from Apr ~22,500) but short-term structure damaged by bearish displacement. Currently testing bearish H4 FVG at 29,261-29,352 from below. M15 bullish OBs forming but no Kill Zone active. Conflicted setup favors WAIT for confirmation.
